purpose: Instrumented REAP-LOOP divergence capture for the Scope 3D divergence view: per-layer S1 (router probability mass on masked experts / total) through a real collapse, TRACE ON (diagnostic, NOT a speed benchmark).

build.source: WSL live-tree /root/ds4 ds4.c md5 771a39a861e9512fed2fc4528780e080 (base 0bdad9a + uncommitted rotation/sensor/PACE live changes; the exact tree the 0020/0021 patch headers anchor to)
build.note: 0020/0021 (S1 trigger / rotate-delta) NOT in this build; not needed for runs 1-2.

model.download: aria2c -x8 on the secure pod, ~343 MB/s, complete

S1_sensor_provenance.claim_001: CONFIRMED at source. ds4.c: the mask applies -1e9 only to the top-k SELECTION bias tensor (g_reap_bias_masked, line ~7512); g->router_probs stays the UNBIASED softmax over all 256 experts (comment ~7384: 'choose the six experts by biased top-k, but weight them using the unbiased router probabilities'). The sensor (patch 0012, inside metal_graph_spex_trace_selected) reads g->router_probs, so the CSV logs PRE-bias router mass on pruned experts.
S1_sensor_provenance.granularity: per (token, layer); one row per (spex_trace_pos, layer). Emitted only while g_reap_mask_on (so nothing during the 50-token PACE warmup; rows start at pos = prompt_len + warmup).

protocol.prompt: html (cyberpunk landing page, Italian, ~78 tok) from run_ds4_exchange_matrix.py PROMPTS['html']
protocol.trace: ON — DS4_SPEX_TRACE_ROUTING + DS4_SPEX_TRACE_ROUTING_WEIGHTS=1 (diagnostic; overhead accepted, NOT a timing run)

variants.mask: W50+K23+rotate32 — exact m1a env (DS4_PACE=1 WARMUP=50 KEEP=23 KEEP_MIN=23 KEEP_MAX=96 KEEP_STEP=0 BREATH_EVERY=999999 RELEARN=0 ROTATE=1 ROTATE_EVERY=32 ROTATE_DECAY=0.98 WRAP=1) + DS4_REAP_SENSOR_LOG
variants.full: DS4_PACE=0 full router, no mask (positive control / 'router libero'); sensor does not log (nothing masked).
